DQA-001.details: Implementation uses md:text-[2.5rem] (40px) on desktop, matching Figma font/size/3xl = 40px exactly.

DQA-002.details: Implementation uses text-header-3 which resolves to 2rem (32px) on mobile, matching Figma font/size/2xl = 32px exactly.

DQA-003.details: PHP applies h-[140px] to inactive tabs ($index !== 0). JS toggles h-[140px] class on tab switch. Figma shows h-[140px] on inactive tab buttons. Page audit confirms 3 inactive tabs with h-[140px] on first variation (4 tabs total, 1 active).

DQA-004.description: Content panel now stretches to full height of tab buttons column
DQA-004.details: Desktop tab area uses items-stretch on flex parent. Content panel column uses flex-1 + flex-col, inner panel uses flex-1 to fill available space. Figma node 807:58405 shows self-stretch + h-full pattern. Screenshots confirm content panel visually stretches to match tab buttons column height across all variations.

passedChecks.implementationValue: text-header-3 = 2rem (32px) on mobile with Anton font

passedChecks.element: Content panel stretches to tab buttons column height
passedChecks.implementationValue: items-stretch on parent, flex-1 on content column and panel

passedChecks.figmaValue: flex row: tab buttons left (flex-1), content panel right (flex-1)
passedChecks.implementationValue: hidden md:flex items-stretch with two flex-1 columns

passedChecks.figmaValue: Stacked accordion items, full border, plus/minus icons
passedChecks.implementationValue: md:hidden flex-col gap-4 with accordion items having border rounded-3xl and +/- icons
Content panel uses flex-col justify-center; inner gaps controlled by TabsItem blocks

passedChecks.figmaValue: border-l, border-t, border-b only (no right border)

passedChecks.implementationValue: ThemeHeading with headingSize=3, uses text-header-3 responsive scale
Controlled by TabsItem inner block content

passedChecks.figmaValue: Node 807:58405 shows justify-center on content panel
passedChecks.implementationValue: flex-col justify-center on content panel wrapper

passedChecks.figmaValue: Description text visible below title on active tab, hidden on inactive
passedChecks.implementationValue: JS toggles .hidden class on .tabs-button-description based on selected state

notes.element: Border radius (tab buttons and content panel)
notes.comment: 1px difference is well within the 2-4px semantic tolerance. Using the theme's rounded-3xl token is the correct approach rather than a hardcoded value.

notes.element: Figma node alignment difference between variants
notes.figmaValue: Node 785:34910 uses items-start; Node 807:58405 uses items-center on tab area container
notes.comment: items-stretch is a good unified approach that works for both Figma variants. When content is short (blue variant), the panel stretches and vertically centers content via justify-center. When content is long (yellow variant), the panel naturally grows. This is a reasonable implementation choice.

notes.element: Line-height minor difference on header utility
notes.implementationValue: text-header-3 utility uses line-height 1.2; md:text-[2.5rem] does not override line-height
notes.comment: The theme text-header-3 utility sets line-height to 1.2 while Figma shows 1.1. This is a 0.1 difference in line-height multiplier. For a 40px font, this equals 4px difference (44px vs 48px line-height). At the boundary of semantic tolerance. The theme utility enforces consistency across all headings at this level, so this is an acceptable trade-off.

output.overallAssessment: All four previously identified issues have been verified as fixed. The desktop tab button titles are now correctly 40px (md:text-[2.5rem]). Mobile accordion titles are correctly 32px (text-header-3). Inactive tab buttons have the correct h-[140px] fixed height. The content panel stretches to full height of the tab buttons column via items-stretch + flex-1. The implementation closely matches both Figma desktop variants (yellow 785:34910 and blue 807:58405) and the mobile variant (785:33971). All spacing, colors, borders, typography, and layout patterns match within the semantic tolerance of 2-4px. Three notes documented for completeness but none require action.
